title: McAlive:Verdant
description: This pack revamps some foliage while trying to keep the vanilla style
body:
## There are 3 versions of this pack: 
**1. height animated-** animates foliage based on the height (**requires optifine or continuity**)-fits well with my other pack [McAlive:Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mcalivegrass)

**2. animated-** animation is the same no matter the height

**3. normal**
   
Here is a little trailer showcasing some of the animations
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sBQb2q3G2zA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
   
Features:
Glow berry vines and glow lichen are emissive and vines are bushy
![Glow berry vines and glow lichen are emissive and vines are bushy(**Optifine or Continuity*)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28e0ff2a3e9ea4ae8d669b6e01ffc611871ff704.png)
**(for the emissive textures to work you need optifine or continuity)**

New sugarcane
![New sugarcane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74541d33d04a3bd2195b287b2398ef87c95cccfa.png)

Mixed color sugarcane addon [Addon link](https://modrinth.com/project/mcalivemixed-sugarcane-addon)
![Mixed color sugarcane addon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90e05c5a3fdd8cbeb696f84f1eb6f6dac9c061c2.png)

- Kelp is now more leafy(see images)
- Ferns are fernier(see images)
- Berry bushes are bushier(see images)
